name: Yemiser Selatta (Lentil Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel shallots and cut lengthwise in half.
2. Seed chiles and cut into 1 inch x 1/8 inch strips.
3. Wash lentils under cold running water.
4. Simmer lentils in lightly salted water for 25 to 30 minutes, or until tender but still somewhat firm. Drain and rinse under cold water to cool them. Drain again and set aside.
5. Combine vinegar, oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Beat with a whisk.
6. Add lentils, shallots, and chiles. Stir gently to mix well.
7. Marinate at room temperature for about 30 minutes before serving, stirring periodically.
